title: Google DeepMind hires philosopher Henry Shevlin to explore AI consciousness and human-machine relationships
description: In a move that signals how AI research is expanding beyond engineering, Google DeepMind has brought a philosopher on board. The appointment highlights growing industry focus on questions around machine consciousness, ethics, and AGI readiness, as tech companies grapple with the deeper implications of increasingly powerful artificial intelligence systems.
content:
In a hiring move that reflects the changing priorities of artificial intelligence research, Google DeepMind has recruited a philosopher to work alongside its engineers and scientists.

title: AI-driven chip shortage slowing efforts to get world online: GSMA
description: Chipmakers are producing fewer less-flashy chips that are used in everyday consumer electronics as they prioritize the lucrative artificial intelligence industry.
content:
A memory chip crunch fueled by the artificial intelligence boom is hindering efforts to bring more people online worldwide, the head of the GSMA telecoms industry association says.
An estimated 2.2 billion people — around a quarter of the global popu... [265 chars]

title: AI: The Stellar Force Reshaping Space Exploration
description: Artificial intelligence is revolutionizing space exploration by enhancing spacecraft autonomy, data processing, and mission reliability. As AI becomes integral in AI-driven predictive maintenance and satellite optimization, its role in future lunar and Mars missions is expected to grow, transforming both scientific and commercial activities in the space sector.
content: Artificial intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming the landscape of space exploration, emerging as a critical technology for overcoming interstellar challenges. Key figures like Brijesh Goel highlight AI's role in addressing the hurdles of distance... [864 chars]

title: IRS enforcement power expansion needed
description: Congress must invest in smarter IRS enforcement — especially through artificial intelligence — and create a fairer tax system.
content:
At a time when Americans are demanding fairness from their institutions, one uncomfortable truth stands out: the U.S. tax system is not nearly as fair as it should be. And the reason is not high tax rates — it is weak enforcement.

title: Courts flag AI misuse in legal work, experts call for accountability, verification
description: The increasing use of artificial intelligence (AI) in legal documentation is triggering a wider debate within India's legal ecosystem, with courts and experts raising concerns over ethics, accuracy and professional accountability.

description: Trained as a physician-scientist, Narasimhan’s career has focused on science, regulation and scaling technologies, areas that are now becoming central to the future of artificial intelligence.

title: Google brings Gemini personal intelligence to India, here is everything you can do with it
description: Google’s artificial intelligence platform has rolled out its Personal Intelligence in India. The feature was previously introduced in the US and Japan. It allows users to connect multiple apps to Gemini, enabling more personalised and context-aware responses.
